name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=True, restart_at_step=2. The new plan is a refinement of the old plan. The first sub-task of the new plan covers the core data loading and initial validation from the old plan's first sub-task. The subsequent steps in the new plan are more granular and include additional modeling (nuisance parameters) not present in the old plan. Therefore, we can reuse the initial data loading and validation work (Step 1 of the old plan) and restart from Step 2 of the new plan to incorporate the refined methodology.
